pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the site with quick access to booking, locations, services, coupons, and key tools.
primary_functions: Let users quickly start core tasks such as finding a location, booking a service, viewing coupons, buying gift cards, and requesting a quote.
Provide a simple ZIP search to jump directly into nearby locations or booking flows.
Highlight featured services, maintenance plans, and current deals relevant to common maintenance needs.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit ZIP search form in homepage hero
Click "Browse Services" quick link
Click "View Coupons & Deals" quick link
Click "Maintenance Plans" quick link
Click "Request a Quote" quick link
Click "Gift Cards" tile
Click "Set Up Maintenance Reminders" tile
Click cart icon in header from the home page

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via "Home" header link
Users can land directly on the homepage via root URL or bookmarks

pages.name: Locations Search & Results
pages.description: Searchable list of service locations with filters and distance-based sorting.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for service locations by ZIP code or city and view them sorted by distance.
Provide filter controls for rating, hours (e.g., open past 7 PM), free shuttle service, and other amenities.
Let users click a location result to open its detailed information and start a booking flow.

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code prefilled from the homepage ZIP search

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a location card in the search results
Click "Book at this Location" button from a result row

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Locations" header link
Accessed via "Locations" footer link
ZIP can be passed as a query parameter from the homepage

pages.name: Location Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific service location.
primary_functions: Show location information including address, phone, hours, star rating, shuttle radius, and available services.
Provide a primary call-to-action button such as Schedule Service or Book Appointment that opens the booking flow for this location.
Display location-specific offers or coupons and basic price ranges for common services like oil changes and brake work.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the location whose details are displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the primary "Schedule Service" / "Book Appointment" button
Click "View Location-Specific Offers" link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a location is selected from search results or other pages via locationId query parameter

pages.name: Services & Categories
pages.description: Browseable catalog of automotive services organized by category.
primary_functions: Allow users to browse and filter services by category (e.g., Tires & Wheels, Brakes, Oil Changes, Scheduled Maintenance).
List services such as Flat Tire Repair / Puncture Repair, Standard Oil Change, and 30,000-Mile Maintenance with brief descriptions and starting prices.
Let users click a specific service to view full details and availability on the Service Detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional service category slug (e.g., brakes, tires_wheels) used to preselect a category tab

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a service in a category list
Click "View coupons for this category" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Services" header link
Accessed via "Services" footer link
Category can be preselected via query parameter from other pages

pages.name: Service Detail & Availability
pages.description: Detailed information about a specific service, with availability search by location.
primary_functions: Provide a full description, typical duration, and price or price range for a specific service (e.g., Flat Tire Repair, Front Brake Pad Replacement).
Allow users to enter a ZIP code and date (e.g., today) to search for locations offering this service and see their prices, hours, and availability.
Display location results with filters such as closing time and price, and let users click View Times or Book to open the scheduling flow for a chosen location.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the service being viewed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Times" or "Book" for a location in the availability results
Click on a location name from the availability results

access_methods.description: Accessed from service listings via serviceId query parameter

pages.name: Schedule Service / Book Appointment
pages.description: Central booking page for choosing service, date, time, and options at a specific location.
primary_functions: Show the selected location and allow users to choose a service from that locations service list (e.g., Standard Oil Change under $70, 30,000-Mile Maintenance under $200).
Provide a date picker to select specific dates such as next Saturday or same-day options.
Display available time slots for the chosen date with any associated pricing, allowing users to select specific time windows (e.g., earliest between 9:0011:00 AM, after 6:00 PM).
Offer additional options such as selecting a free shuttle ride, entering a shuttle pickup address, or confirming drop-off/while-you-wait preferences.
Confirm the appointment details and submit the booking via a primary action such as Book Appointment or Confirm Appointment, then show an on-page confirmation state.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the location where the appointment will be booked
Optional service identifier used to preselect a service in the catalog
Optional service package identifier to preselect a specific package
Optional ISO date string used to preselect the appointment date

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Proceed to Checkout" after successfully creating an appointment (if payment is required)
Click the location name or "View Location Details" link from the booking page

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user chooses to schedule service at a specific location via locationId (and optional service/date) query parameters
Reached after form actions like "Schedule Service" buttons on location and service detail pages

pages.name: Coupons & Deals
pages.description: Listing of all available coupons and promotional offers.
primary_functions: Display a list of coupons and deals with key details such as discount percent, applicable services, and expiration.
Provide category filters (e.g., Brakes, Oil Changes, Tires) so users can view coupons relevant to a service type like brake service.
Allow users to click a coupon to view full details and proceed to apply the coupon to eligible services on the Coupon Detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional coupon category filter such as brakes or oil_changes
Optional minimum discount percentage used to prefilter coupons
Optional location identifier to show coupons relevant to a particular shop

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a coupon tile in the list
Click "View eligible services" link on a coupon

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Coupons & Deals" header link
Accessed via "Coupons & Deals" footer link
Category, minimum discount, or location can be pre-set via query parameters

pages.name: Coupon Detail & Apply
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific coupon and tools to apply it to services.
primary_functions: Show complete coupon information, including discount value (e.g., 15% off or more), terms, and eligible services.
Provide an Apply Coupon to Service action that shows a list or selector of eligible services such as Front Brake Pad Replacement.

Allow users to select a specific service and package (e.g., front brake pad replacement under $350 before discount) and add it directly to the cart with the coupon applied via an Add to Cart with Coupon button.
Confirm that the discounted service has been added and give a direct path to the cart/checkout page.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the coupon to display and apply

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Cart" or "Proceed to Checkout" after adding a discounted service to the cart
Click "Browse more services in this category" from coupon detail

access_methods.description: Accessed from the coupons list or featured coupon links via couponId query parameter

pages.name: Maintenance Plans
pages.description: Vehicle-specific maintenance plan finder and plan listing.
primary_functions: Provide dropdowns to select vehicle Year, Make, and Model (e.g., 2018 Honda Civic) and submit to view available plans.
Display a list of maintenance plans for the chosen vehicle, including monthly price, warranty length, and key benefits.
Allow users to mark multiple plans (e.g., first and second results) for comparison using checkboxes and proceed to a comparison view via a Compare Selected button.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Compare Selected" after marking two or more plans
Click on a plan name or "View Details" link for a single plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Maintenance Plans" header link
Accessed via "Maintenance Plans" footer link

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of selected maintenance plans.
primary_functions: Show selected plans in a side-by-side layout highlighting warranty length, coverage details, and monthly pricing.
Help users identify which plan has the longest warranty while remaining under a specified monthly price (e.g., under $50/month).
Provide a Select Plan button for each compared plan that takes the user to the detailed plan page for the chosen option.

incoming_params.description: Comma-separated list of maintenance plan IDs selected for comparison

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Select Plan" under one of the compared plans

access_methods.description: Accessed from the maintenance plans page via planIds query parameter

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific maintenance plan.
primary_functions: Present full plan details including included services, service intervals, warranty period, and payment options.
Display clear pricing, including monthly cost and any enrollment fees, so users can confirm it meets their budget (e.g., under $50/month).
Allow users to enroll by adding the plan to their cart via an Add Annual Plan to Cart or Enroll in Plan button.
Provide an action such as Go to Cart or Proceed to Checkout to take users directly to the cart/checkout page after choosing a plan.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the maintenance plan being viewed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Go to Cart" or "Proceed to Checkout" after adding the plan to the cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via planId query parameter from plans listing or comparison

pages.name: Request a Quote
pages.description: Form for requesting a service quote and preferred drop-off time.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose a service type (e.g., Engine Diagnostics / Check Engine Light) from a dropdown.
Let users enter a ZIP code (e.g., 60601) and select the nearest location from suggested results.
Provide options for visit type (e.g., Drop-off) and a date/time selector that highlights the earliest available morning time within the next 3 days between specified hours (e.g., 8:0010:00 AM).
Collect contact information including name, phone number, email, and a free-text issue description (e.g., check engine light details).
Submit the quote request via a Submit Quote Request button and show an on-page confirmation message.

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Request a Quote" header link

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Page to purchase digital or physical gift cards.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose a delivery method such as Email Gift Card.
Provide preset and/or custom amount options, including a $100 preset selection.
Collect recipient and sender information (names and emails) and an optional personal message.
Add the configured gift card to the cart via an Add Gift Card to Cart button and guide users toward checkout.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Proceed to Checkout" after adding a gift card to the cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Gift Cards" header link
Accessed via "Gift Cards" footer link

pages.name: Cart & Checkout
pages.description: Unified page to review cart contents and proceed through checkout.
primary_functions: Display all items in the cart, including services with applied coupons, maintenance plans, and gift cards, with prices and discounts.
Allow users to review and adjust cart contents, such as removing items or updating quantities where applicable.
Show an order summary with subtotals, discounts, taxes, and total amount due.
Provide a checkout flow that collects necessary billing and payment details as needed and a primary action to proceed with or finalize purchase/booking.
Support entry points from various flows (e.g., View Cart, Proceed to Checkout, Go to Cart).

access_methods.description: Accessed via a persistent cart icon in the header from any page
Reached after actions like "View Cart" or "Proceed to Checkout" from other pages

pages.name: Maintenance Reminders
pages.description: Tool for setting up automated maintenance reminder schedules.
primary_functions: Allow users to specify vehicle details (Year, Make, Model) and current mileage.
Let users choose their driving habits or estimated annual mileage (e.g., 10,000 miles per year).
Provide options for reminder frequency (e.g., Every 3 months).
Collect contact preferences (Email and SMS) and contact information such as name, email, phone, and ZIP code.
Create and activate the reminder schedule via a Create Reminder Schedule or Save and Activate Reminders button with on-page confirmation.

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Maintenance Reminders" header link
Accessed via "Maintenance Reminders" footer link

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the repair service business.
primary_functions: Explain the companys history, mission, and service philosophy to build trust.
Highlight certifications, technician qualifications, and any guarantees or warranties offered.
Reinforce reasons to choose the business for services such as brakes, tires, oil changes, and diagnostics.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Find a Location" call-to-action from About Us content

access_methods.description: Accessed via "About Us" footer link

pages.name: Contact & Support
pages.description: Contact information and support inquiry form.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as phone numbers, support email, and general inquiry information.
Show a simple contact form for questions not covered by booking or quote flows.
Offer guidance on how to modify or cancel appointments and where to find location-specific contact info.

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Contact & Support" footer link

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
primary_functions: Present the sites privacy policy, including how customer data and contact details are used.
Provide terms of service covering bookings, quotes, maintenance plans, and gift card purchases.
Offer links or references to any additional legal documents or disclosures if needed.

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Privacy & Terms" footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with quick links to key services, locations, and offers
Find nearby service locations and view details
Browse available automotive services by category
View and apply current service coupons and discounts
Find and compare vehicle maintenance plans
Request a service quote and preferred drop-off time
Purchase email-delivery or other gift cards
Set up maintenance reminders by email and SMS

footer_links.description: Learn about the company and its services
Get in touch for questions or support
Search and view all service locations
Explore maintenance plan options for your vehicle
Sign up for periodic maintenance reminders
View privacy policy and terms of service
